member.name: T:ChatResponse`1
member.summary: Base class for chat response models with example and signature support.

member.name: P:ChatResponse`1._example
member.summary: Gets an example instance of the response type.

member.name: P:ChatResponse`1.Example
member.summary: Gets a static example instance.

member.name: P:ChatResponse`1._signature
member.summary: Gets the type signature string.

member.name: P:ChatResponse`1.Signature
member.summary: Gets the static type signature.

member.name: M:ChatResponse`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ChatResponse class.

member.name: T:HazinaChatMessage
member.summary: Represents a chat message in the Hazina LLM system.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.MessageId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this message.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.Role
member.summary: Gets or sets the role of the message sender.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the text content of the message.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.AgentName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the agent.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.FunctionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the function.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.FlowName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the flow.

member.name: P:HazinaChatMessage.Response
member.summary: Gets or sets the response content.

member.name: M:HazinaChatMessage.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaChatMessage class.

member.name: M:HazinaChatMessage.#ctor(HazinaMessageRole,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaChatMessage class with the specified role and text.
member.param: The role of the message sender.
The text content of the message.

member.name: M:HazinaChatMessage.#ctor(HazinaMessageRole,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaChatMessage class with full details.
member.param: The role of the message sender.
The text content of the message.

member.name: T:HazinaMessageRole
member.summary: Represents the role of a message in a chat conversation.

member.name: M:HazinaMessageRole.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HazinaMessageRole class.

member.name: P:HazinaMessageRole.Role
member.summary: Gets or sets the role identifier.

member.name: M:HazinaMessageRole.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified role.

member.name: F:HazinaMessageRole.User
member.summary: Represents a user role.

member.name: F:HazinaMessageRole.System
member.summary: Represents a system role.

member.name: F:HazinaMessageRole.Assistant
member.summary: Represents an assistant role.

member.name: T:LLMResponse`1
member.summary: Wrapper class for LLM responses that includes the result and token usage information.
member.typeparam: The type of the response result.

remarks.para: All LLM operations return this wrapper to provide transparency into token usage and costs. This enables cost tracking, budget management, and performance optimization.
Use the property to track API costs and optimize prompts.

member.name: P:LLMResponse`1.Result
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual response result from the LLM.
member.remarks:
The type depends on the method called:
string for text responses
Custom types for structured responses
for image generation

member.name: P:LLMResponse`1.TokenUsage
member.summary: Gets or sets the token usage and cost information for this request.
member.remarks: Use this to track API costs and optimize your prompts. Token counts and costs are calculated based on the model's pricing.

member.name: M:LLMResponse`1.#ctor(`0,TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Creates a new LLM response with the specified result and token usage.

member.name: T:TokenUsageInfo
member.summary: Contains token usage and cost information for an LLM API call.

remarks.para: This class tracks both the number of tokens used and the associated costs. Costs are calculated based on the model's pricing at the time of the call.
Multiple instances can be aggregated using the + operator to track cumulative usage across a conversation or session.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.InputTokens
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of tokens in the input/prompt.
member.remarks: Input tokens include the system prompt, conversation history, and user message.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.OutputTokens
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of tokens generated in the response.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.TotalTokens
member.summary: Gets the total number of tokens (input + output).

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.InputCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the cost in USD for the input tokens.
member.remarks: Calculated based on the model's per-token pricing for input.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.OutputCost
member.summary: Gets or sets the cost in USD for the output tokens.
member.remarks: Calculated based on the model's per-token pricing for output. Output tokens are typically more expensive than input tokens.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.TotalCost
member.summary: Gets the total cost in USD for this API call.

member.name: P:TokenUsageInfo.ModelName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name/ID of the model used for this call.

member.name: M:TokenUsageInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new empty token usage info.

member.name: M:TokenUsageInfo.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new token usage info with the specified values.
member.param: Cost of input tokens in USD.
Cost of output tokens in USD.

member.name: M:TokenUsageInfo.op_Addition(TokenUsageInfo,TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Aggregates two token usage info instances.
member.returns: A new instance with summed tokens and costs.
member.remarks: The model name is taken from the first non-empty value.
